results.title: Undocumented teen jailed 14 years, whipped for robbing woman
results.description: SANDAKAN: An undocumented 19-year-old foreigner was sentenced to 14 years' jail and eight strokes of the cane after pleading guilty to robbing and injuring a 64-year-old woman during a house break-in in Sandakan.

results.title: Thousand-year-old ancient oak tree tied to 'Robin Hood' has died, charity says
results.description: A giant, ancient oak tree located in the Sherwood Forest -- the iconic setting of the "Robin Hood" legend -- has died, a UK wildlife charity says.

results.title: Portugal, Slovakia to provide drone defense equipment to Romania, president says
results.description: Portugal and Slovakia expressed their availability to provide Romania with drone defense equipment as part of efforts to consolidate security on NATO’s Eastern flank, president Nicușor Dan announced on June 18. The two countries join the United States, France, Italy, and Spain, which already contribute or have announced equipment or expertise contributions in defending Romania’s airspace against drone incursions, the president said. Ukraine will also dispatch teams of specialists to Romania and the Baltic states to share its experience in countering drone threats , president Volodymyr Zelensky announced earlier this month. The president's announcement follows recent incidents where a Russian drone crashed into a residential apartment building in the Romanian city of Galați on May 29, and a maritime drone exploded in the Port of Constanța on June 5. The drone crash in Galați was condemned in a June 18 European Council statement on Ukraine and on European defense and security. The statement strongly condemns Russia’s missile and drone attacks against civilians in Ukraine, the recent strikes against the UNESCO World Heritage site of Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra, “as well as the increasingly aggressive, reckless and irresponsible behavior towards EU member states, including foreign information manipulation and interference, and threats against the European diplomatic presence in Ukraine.” "The recent incident in which a Russian drone carrying explosives crashed into a residential building in Romania, as well as similar incidents in other member states, are a direct result of Russia’s war of aggression against Ukraine and threaten the security of EU citizens and regional stability. The European Council strongly condemns the repeated violations of member states’ airspace and territorial waters and underlines that Russia bears full responsibility for the consequences of its escalatory behavior and its continued military actions. The European Council reaffirms its unwavering commitment to the security of all member states,” the statement reads. (Photo: Presidency.ro) simona@romania-insider.com

results.title: Al-Hazzaa reviews broadcasting and production technologies at Qatar TV and QBC
results.description:
Doha, Qatar: The Qatar Media Corporation (QMC), represented by Qatar Television and Qatar Business Channel (QBC), welcomed Director General of the Gulf Radio and Television Organisation H E Dr. Abdulrahman bin Abdulaziz Al-Hazzaa, as part of an official visit aimed at exploring the latest technologies and advanced systems employed in broadcasting and media production.

Dr. Al-Hazzaa was received at the Qatar Television headquarters byDirector of Qatar TelevisionAli Saleh Al Sada, who presented an overview of the operational workflow within the television studios, including production and broadcasting processes. The delegation also toured the facilities and viewed the state-of-the-art equipment and technologies used to enhance visual content and improve production quality.

The visit also included a tour of QBC, where Dr. Al-Hazzaa was introduced to the channel’s specialised studios and advanced technical infrastructure supporting the production of economic and news content.

In addition, Dr. Al-Hazzaa visited the non-Arabic language radio stations operating under the Qatar Media Corporation. He was welcomed byDirector of Qatar RadioJaber Mohammed Al Surour, who guided him through the facilities and briefed him on the workflow and media services provided across the corporation’s various radio platforms.

At the conclusion of the visit, Dr. Al-Hazzaa commended the Qatar Media Corporation’s advanced technical capabilities and modern studio facilities.

results.title: Federal police arrest second man over alleged people-smuggling ‘black flight’ to Indonesia
results.description: A man has been charged after allegedly flying two of Australia’s most wanted men to Indonesia aboard a transponder-deactivated “black flight”.
